source: BSData wh40k-10e catalog (cross-referenced against Wahapedia keyword list from web, verified 2026-03-10)
notes: Stats and weapons extracted from BSData 'Xenos - Tyranids.cat' fixture.
Keywords cross-referenced against Wahapedia search data (EPIC HERO, MONSTER, CHARACTER, etc.).
Wahapedia direct access unavailable; stats here reflect the BSData fixture under test.
TYRANIDS keyword comes from 'Faction: Tyranids' category — same extraction path as Hive Tyrant.
HIVE TYRANT keyword is legitimate: Swarmlord carries the HIVE TYRANT keyword in 10th ed.
Points: 220pts (from BSData). Wahapedia may show a different value if points were updated.
Inline ability profiles (Hive Commander, Malign Presence, Domination of the Hive Mind) DO surface
in the pipeline output as RuleDocs because they are ability-typed profiles on the entry. They are
present in the dump but not in expectedRules (they are extra rules, not canonical datasheet rules).
Lord of Deceit (Aura) also surfaces — the earlier note claiming infoLink type=profile wouldn't
appear was incorrect. _resolveInfoLink materialises both <profile> and <rule> targets as BoundProfiles.
Twin-linked and Torrent are weapon-keyword rules, not unit-ability rules — excluded from expectedRules.
FIXTURE: Catalog files must be present in test/ to run (same deps as Hive Tyrant group).

knownDiscrepancies.note: BSData fixture stats (M 8", T 10, W 10, LD 7+) reflect the BSData snapshot. BSData is authoritative. Any difference from an external reference (Wahapedia) is a documentation-only discrepancy; it does not drive code changes.

Previously recorded as category-faction-extraction pipeline gap. Resolved: TYRANIDS keyword IS present in current dump (categoryTokens includes 'tyranids'). Classification retained for audit history only.

Leader was absent from the Swarmlord dump due to the Tyranid catalog's Leader <rule> node having an empty <description> element. Fixed: M5 _bindRuleNodeAsProfile now always emits the description characteristic even when empty; M9 _buildRuleDocs relaxed to allow empty descriptions. Leader IS present in current dump with unit-specific description. Fix confirmed.
